query:
SELECT bsup.id, bsup.financial_responsible_id, bsup.unit_id, bsup.price_per_report, bsup.starts_at, bsup.ends_at
FROM billing_system_unit_prices bsup
WHERE bsup.unit_id = 210001
ORDER BY bsup.starts_at DESC
LIMIT 10;
